commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]

target.title: feat(memory-lancedb): add smart extraction with atomic fact decomposition
target.body:
Add LLM-based memory extraction that decomposes conversations into atomic, self-contained memories via a single LLM call.

Key design (differs from Pro's multi-pipeline approach):
- Single-shot extraction instead of extract→classify→dedup→merge
- Atomic fact granularity (one memory = one information point)
- Third-person perspective enforced (not raw user text)
- Time resolution (relative → absolute dates)
- Language matching (Chinese input → Chinese output)
- Structured output with key/value/tags for retrieval enhancement
- Importance floor at 0.5 (below = not stored)

Prompt design draws from HonAgent (atomic facts, attribution), Memos (structured output, language matching, dedup), and Pro (category classification, importance scoring).

Config: smartExtraction.enabled + smartExtraction.model
Backward compatible: regex path used when not enabled.

## Summary

Describe the problem and fix in 2–5 bullets:

If this PR fixes a plugin beta-release blocker, title it `fix(<plugin-id>): beta blocker - <summary>` and link the matching `Beta blocker: <plugin-name> - <summary>` issue labeled `beta-blocker`. Contributors cannot label PRs, so the title is the PR-side signal for maintainers and automation.

  - [ ] Unit test
  - [ ] Seam / integration test
  - [ ] End-to-end test
  - [ ] Existing coverage already sufficient
- Target test or file:

- Why this is the smallest reliable guardrail:
- Existing test that already covers this (if any):
- If no new test is added, why not:

## User-visible / Behavior Changes

List user-visible changes (including defaults/config).  
If none, write `None`.

## Diagram (if applicable)

For UI changes or non-trivial logic flows, include a small ASCII diagram reviewers can scan quickly. Otherwise write `N/A`.

```text

```

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary: The PR adds an opt-in `smartExtraction` config path to the bundled `memory-lancedb` plugin, a new LLM smart-extractor module with parser tests, and an auto-capture branch that can decompose conversations into atomic memories through a chat-completion call.
